text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But you know, I think I've done pretty well up till
now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I ran in the Satsuki Sho. Healed my nail. Did well
in a G2 and other races. Like, low-key, I crushed
it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
When people think of me, I hope they think of
everything I did last year.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Now, though... things aren't looking too hot.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So no one needs to see me anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text: My mom's here! Let's all go to the beach today!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ☆ Party! Party! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text:
...Jordan? You good? Wait, you have today off
too?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, yeah! I'm totally fine!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm supposed to rest my legs, so... pretty sure I
don't need to check with my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru E
text_block_list.text:
Whatcha doin' on your phone over there?
Messaging your crush?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru D
text_block_list.text: ...No! Ugh, c'mon, let's go already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
New Year's is over and school has been back in
session for a few days now. But still no word from
Tosen Jordan.
choice_data_list: (She's leaving me on read...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've reached out on LANE, and even visited her
classroom, but she seems to be avoiding me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Buzz, buzz...)
choice_data_list: Could it be...

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Hello. Is this Tosen Jordan's trainer? Do you have
time to talk?
choice_data_list: Oh, uh... how can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Well, one of my students just reached out to me...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: I lost at tryouts agaaain! I haaate schoool!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
Holy, the water's colder than my teacher's stare
after I failed that test for the fifth time. ☆

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (The beach, the ocean... This is nice.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Wonder if my nails will peel off if I put my feet
in. I didn't bring any oil or anything...)

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text: ...Jordan? Are you gonna get in?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah... Sure.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Well, you know what? Who cares what happens
to my nails?)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I think I'm done worrying about it.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru D
text_block_list.text: ...Jordan?
choice_data_list: Wait!
Wait!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Trainer?! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru D
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Jordan! I've just been really worried about
you recently, and...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru D
text_block_list.text:
Teach, I really need your help! Do you have
Jordan's trainer's contact info?!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru D
text_block_list.text:
She seems really down. We try to cheer her up,
but nothing works. We're heading to the beach
now, and...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But... why? Why did you have to get a teacher
involved?
choice_data_list: That's how worried she is about you.
That's how worried she is about you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, right! We just hang out together because
we have the same dumb people vibes...
choice_data_list: Do you really think that's all?
Do you really think that's all?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! What's going on?! Why is your trainer
here?! And what's with the angry vibe?!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on a second! Jordan worked so hard last
year, didn't she?! She should be able to have fun
for today at least!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Jordan is like, our star! We need her to recharge
so she can shine for us again! Right?!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: Honestly, you're such an inspiration for gals like us! You're like our star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sounds like they really look up to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sounds like they really look up to you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But I... I'm not someone worth looking up to...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
If you want inspiration for girls like you guys,
what about City? Or Helios, or Palmer? They're
all way better than me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I'm legit dumb! Like, it's over for me! No way
I can compete in senior year!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm just going to keep losing and losing and
losing... Honestly, I shouldn't even be trying in
the first place!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
All it's gonna amount to is me running like crap
and embarrassing myself...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text: But... we're dumb too.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text:
We look up to you so much, Jordan. From day
one, you've let all of us dream bigger.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter how many times you lose, I just
know you're always gonna slay.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: You really are a dummy!
You really are a dummy!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?
choice_data_list: A big dummy! The biggest, even!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She plunged head first into the Triple Crown tour
with only the vague goal of "making it big" to
guide her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tried to shrug off injury with the pure desire
to run in the Satsuki Sho, despite her entire
career being on the line.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yo. Five nail tips done. Pretty good, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fifteen seconds, then! Grab your
stopwatch—let's do it! Ready...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tackles training head-on with simple
earnestness, even if she doesn't understand what
we're trying to accomplish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She works stupid hard, throwing herself into one
foolish challenge after another.
choice_data_list: That's what makes you strong.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What are you... I...
choice_data_list: That's why you never gave up the fight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter what she's up against, she keeps
fighting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Tosen Jordan were smarter, she would have set
a practical goal and avoided the Satsuki Sho if
her nails got worse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she would have lost her will to run when
she saw the lineup for the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She would have understood what common sense
deemed impossible for her, understood that
giving up is always an option when faced with a
wall.
choice_data_list:
But you're a dummy, so you always chose to
fight.

But you're a dummy, so you always chose to
fight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: No matter what others said, she faced even the most imposing walls with the unbridled optimism that they can be scaled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And, to be perfectly honest...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, we've made it this far somehow. All we can
do is try our best, right?
choice_data_list: You're a badass when you fight.
You're a badass when you fight.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Quit joking around.
choice_data_list: I'm not. I honestly think you're cool.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her friends nod in agreement.
choice_data_list: So embrace your stupidity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next time common sense tries to get in our
way, we just have to dumb down and take it on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, common sense has never stopped her
yet.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You...
choice_data_list:
What could be cooler than being the greatest
dummy there is?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Are you stupid?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know... You're the real dummy! Dumb, dumb,
dumb dummy dumb!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Who's ever heard of being the greatest dummy,
anyway? That's...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's something only a dummy like me could pull
off!
choice_data_list: Now you're talking!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Shut up... dummy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tears Tosen Jordan has been holding in
finally come pouring out.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Soy sauce noodles, broth, toppings! Put 'em
together, and...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Close with capers!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So that's what you want me to aim for? You're kidding, right?
choice_data_list:
Well, if you want to be the greatest, she's one
of the walls in your way.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uhh... yeah, no, I think that's pushing it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lack of common sense aside, Gold Ship's prowess
is undeniable, and she's announced her bid for
the Senior Spring Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about this is making me even
dumber... So we really have to do this, huh? The...
Osaka Hai, was it?
choice_data_list: That's right. The Osaka Hai comes first.
That's right. The Osaka Hai comes first.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...And close with capers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Jordan! Welcome back! Are you training right
now?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Palmer?! Um...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Did you decide on your goal? I'll join you if you're
gonna run.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Thanks. Do you mind if I ask you later?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Cause my new goal is to be the greatest!
